boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account and monitor-only no-block disposition; policy permits release on exact match.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 matches PAY-TES-074 exactly; STD-TES-074-P authorizes release on monitor-only disposition when name/country/taxID/account align.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible flag applies to non-matching entity (different name, country) and does not open defect on exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and policy both predate action; no open dependency on flag for matched counterparty.

final_answer: Payment release allowed. CLR-TES-074 exactly matches PAY-TES-074 on name, country, tax ID and account with monitor-only no-block disposition. Policy STD-TES-074-P authorizes execution. Visible FLAG-TES-074 applies to non-matching Belarus entity and does not block the closed boundary.
